title: ジャパンカップの後に・“皇帝”推参

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You were watching, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Even against such stiff competition, I still
delivered!
choice_data_list: That was your best race yet!
That was your best race yet!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heheh! Actually, while I was running, I felt like I
finally got a good sense of things.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not talking about my time or my pacing,
though...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean that I realized how much I've gone through
and how much I've achieved.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Grown? Yeah... that's it! I've really grown a lot!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right... I'm gonna win the next race. I'm
absolutely certain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai's results in the Japan Cup only add to her
growing acclaim.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are! Come with me a sec, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm about to see Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You'll see! Just come on already!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez! I wanna talk to you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I've been waiting for you, Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You have? For me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I've waited a long time for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You saw me in the Japan Cup, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. You showed unparalleled valor. It
was a race truly befitting a Monarch.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Teio, let me be frank. In the past, I have always
taken my place on the track for the sake of my
ideals and ambition.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: However, this time is... different.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This time, I simply wish to race you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Both as Symboli Rudolf and as an Umamusume, I
ask you to race me, Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our battleground shall be the greatest race of
them all! The Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-you're on!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll show you the power of the Monarch.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: One who can take down even the Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final match against Symboli Rudolf will be at
the Arima Kinen!
